ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Houston, North Area) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location and energy consumption characteristics */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Primary sector (residential, commercial, industrial) of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast interval */,
  "interval_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interval in minutes */,
  "interval_description" TEXT /* Description of the interval purpose or usage */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interval is the default interval for data collection */,
  "interval_start" INTEGER /* Start time of the interval (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted energy demand value */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the forecast */,
  "forecasted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_forecasts_forecasted_by FOREIGN KEY ("forecasted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded on that date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded on that date */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded on that date */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation recorded on that date */,
  "cloud_coverage" REAL /* Cloud coverage percentage on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, weekly) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the alert in minutes */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
